---
title: "Projets"
pagetitle: "Projects"
description: "Une sélection de projets data, finance et économie sur lesquels j'ai travaillé."
listing:
  - id: projects
    contents: "**/*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "240px"
    fields: [image, title, description, categories]
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: unnumbered
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 30
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: false
body-class: page-projects
---

::: {#projects}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  // Liste FIXE des catégories affichées en filtre. Elles apparaissent toujours,
  // même si aucun projet ne porte le tag. Modifie ce tableau pour ajouter/retirer.
  var FIXED_CATEGORIES = [
    "Finance",
    "Machine Learning",
    "Data Science",
    "BI",
    "Économétrie"
  ];

  function applyLayout() {
    var listing = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing-container-grid")
               || document.querySelector(".quarto-listing")
               || document.getElementById("listing-projects")
               || document.getElementById("projects");
    if (!listing) return;

    document.body.classList.add("page-projects");

    var mainEl = document.getElementById("quarto-document-content")
              || document.querySelector("main.content");
    if (mainEl) {
      mainEl.classList.remove("column-page-left", "column-page-right");
      mainEl.classList.add("column-screen");
    }

    // Cache le bloc de filtres dynamique généré par Quarto
    var quartoCat = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing-category");
    if (quartoCat) quartoCat.style.display = "none";
    var quartoCatTitle = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing-category-title");
    if (quartoCatTitle) quartoCatTitle.style.display = "none";

    var marginSidebar = document.getElementById("quarto-margin-sidebar");
    if (marginSidebar) marginSidebar.style.display = "none";

    // Évite la double injection si le script tourne deux fois
    if (document.querySelector(".projects-filter-bar")) return;

    // Construit la barre de filtres FIXE
    var wrap = document.createElement("div");
    wrap.className = "projects-filter-bar";

    var cats = document.createElement("div");
    cats.className = "quarto-listing-category category-fixed";
    wrap.appendChild(cats);

    function clearActive() {
      cats.querySelectorAll(".category.active").forEach(function (el) {
        el.classList.remove("active");
      });
    }
    function showAll() {
      var cards = listing.querySelectorAll(".quarto-grid-item, .quarto-post, .g-col-1");
      cards.forEach(function (c) { c.style.display = ""; });
    }

    // Bouton "Tous"
    var allBtn = document.createElement("div");
    allBtn.className = "category category-all";
    allBtn.dataset.category = "";
    allBtn.textContent = "Tous";
    allBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      clearActive();
      showAll();
    });
    cats.appendChild(allBtn);

    // Boutons fixes
    FIXED_CATEGORIES.forEach(function (label) {
      var btn = document.createElement("div");
      btn.className = "category";
      btn.dataset.category = label;
      btn.textContent = label;
      btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
        clearActive();
        btn.classList.add("active");
        var target = label.trim().toLowerCase();
        var cards = listing.querySelectorAll(".quarto-grid-item, .quarto-post, .g-col-1");
        cards.forEach(function (card) {
          var tags = Array.prototype.map.call(
            card.querySelectorAll(".listing-category"),
            function (t) { return (t.textContent || "").trim().toLowerCase(); }
          );
          card.style.display = tags.indexOf(target) >= 0 ? "" : "none";
        });
      });
      cats.appendChild(btn);
    });

    listing.parentNode.insertBefore(wrap, listing);
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", applyLayout);
  } else {
    applyLayout();
  }
})();
</script>
```
